Hero.title: Defend Freedom
Hero.subtitle: Duty-ready shirts, hats, hoodies, and custom team gear for first responders, departments, and the communities that stand behind them.

Home.pageTitle: Custom Gear for First Responders & Teams
Home.description: Defend Freedom Industries creates custom apparel and gear for first responders, departments, teams, and community organizations.
Home.ogDescription: Custom apparel and gear for first responders, departments, teams, and community organizations.

collections.title: Gear for the department, the shift, and the weekend.
collections.description: Browse collections made for everyday wear, custom department orders, fundraisers, and team outfitting.

dutyShirts.title: Duty shirts and job shirts
dutyShirts.description: Clean, dependable apparel for crews that need gear to look sharp and hold up.

teamStores.title: Team and department stores
teamStores.description: Organized collections for departments, schools, squads, and community groups.

bulkOrders.title: Bulk custom orders
bulkOrders.description: Straightforward ordering for hats, hoodies, tees, and recurring team needs.

customOrders.title: From design idea to finished gear without the runaround.
customOrders.description: Whether you need a small batch for the crew or a larger run for an entire organization, DFI keeps the process clear, practical, and focused on gear people will actually wear.

design.title: Send the idea
design.description: Share your logo, department, event, or reference and we will shape it into a clean apparel direction.

approve.title: Approve the details
approve.description: Review product choices, placement, sizes, and pricing before anything moves forward.

deliver.title: Gear up the crew
deliver.description: Orders are produced, packed, and sent out with the care a team order deserves.

highQuality.title: Quality blanks
highQuality.description: Apparel selected for comfort, fit, durability, and clean decoration.

bestPrices.title: Clear pricing
bestPrices.description: Competitive pricing for individual purchases, custom batches, and larger orders.

fastDelivery.title: Reliable fulfillment
fastDelivery.description: Straightforward timelines and practical communication from order to delivery.

Product.addedToCartDescription: {name} has been added to your cart
Product.errorAddToCart: Failed to add item to cart

customOrderSupport.title: Need this for a crew or department?
customOrderSupport.description: We help with bulk quantities, custom logos, department stores, and repeat team orders. Reach out and we will help you price the right setup.

shipping.question: Can you handle custom department or team orders?
shipping.answer: Yes. DFI can help with department apparel, team stores, event shirts, and recurring crew orders. We can work from your artwork or help refine the direction before production.

returns.question: How does artwork approval work?
returns.answer: For custom orders, you review the design direction, garment choice, placement, and pricing before production starts so everyone is aligned on the final look.

tracking.question: Can we reorder later for new crew members?
tracking.answer: Yes. DFI is set up to support repeat ordering so departments and teams can add sizes or replenish popular items without starting from scratch each time.

international.question: What happens after I place an order?
international.answer: You will receive order confirmation right away. For decorated or coordinated orders, DFI follows up as needed on artwork, timing, and fulfillment details before the gear ships.
